title: tagetes biflora
intro: Tagetes biflora, also known as the Mexican marigold, is a flowering plant species belonging to the sunflower family. It possesses medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds, which contribute to its traditional use in folk medicine. The health benefits of Tagetes biflora include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a valuable herbal remedy. Herbal preparations of Tagetes biflora can be consumed as teas, infusions, or applied topically in the form of ointments or salves, depending on the desired health benefits.
